scope_reduction.why_not_full_history: GeckoTerminal public API only serves the last 180 days of pool OHLCV. The script auto-clips start_time to end_time - 180 days. To fetch full pool inception history, an Analyst+ plan or a different DEX data provider is required.
scope_reduction.pools_scope: Uniswap V3 USDC/USDT 0.01% and 0.05% pools on Arbitrum One. The script supports arbitrary pools via --pools.

api_limit_note: GeckoTerminal public OHLCV endpoint restricted to the last 180 days.

catalog_reconciliation.dual_publish_explanation: Multiple PASS dex_stablecoin_ohlcv datasets exist from dry-run/real re-runs (report pins ds_1fed0ae109711a7bda842e0fa2a21bb4e934a3b4e409c3aae3d94099d5c4d181 with 357 rows; resolve_latest currently returns ds_1fed0ae109711a7bda842e0fa2a21bb4e934a3b4e409c3aae3d94099d5c4d181). Consumers of DATA-006 evidence must pin report_dataset_id.
